name: HeatRow
goal: Single row of heatmap cells for use inside <ce-heatmap> slot mode (CDR-005), or as a standalone minimal row when used outside.
description: Carries a label attribute (Y-axis header) and a default slot for <ce-heat-cell> children. When nested inside ce-heatmap the parent reads label as an attribute and iterates ce-heat-cell children via querySelectorAll — the row itself renders nothing (display:contents). When used standalone it renders a labeled flex row of cells. Non-ce-heat-cell slot children are passed through to light DOM and ignored by the parent's data-resolution path.

props.name: label
props.description: Row label displayed in the Y-axis header column. CDR-002 NOT-applicable: always a short identifier string.

slots.description: Default slot for <ce-heat-cell> children. Non-ce-heat-cell elements are passed through to light DOM and ignored by the parent ce-heatmap data path.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between cells and row padding in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Label text color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Label font size in standalone mode.

a11y.notes: In standalone mode renders a visible labeled row. When nested inside ce-heatmap the parent provides table-row semantics via <tr>/<th>/<td>. The label attribute is always plain text per HTML.
